passives.name: Rock Solid
passives.effects: Every first incoming instance of {{tt|post-mitigation|Damage calculated after modifiers}} {{tip|basic damage}} per {{tip|cast instance}} is [[Damage modifier|reduced]] by 15, with a '''maximum''' of 20% reduction each.

effects_structured.raw: Every first incoming post-mitigation basic-damage instance per cast instance is reduced by 15, capped at 20% reduction.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution-semantics review: Rock Solid reduces the first post-mitigation incoming basic-damage instance per cast instance by a flat 15, capped at 20% reduction for that instance.
Player-visible behavior: rapid multi-hit/rapid-attack sources are reduced on each qualifying first-per-cast instance, and the reduction scales down on low post-mitigation hits due to the 20% cap.
Page notes indicate Rock Solid applies to all basic attack damage sources (including non-champion sources such as turrets).

sources.name: Data Dragon item dataset
sources.used_for: baseline item identity, stat block, and raw effect text

sources.used_for: secondary validation against canonical static item data mirror

sources.name: League of Legends Wiki - Warden's Mail
sources.used_for: page-level verification of Rock Solid first-instance-per-cast semantics, flat reduction and cap behavior, and notes on basic-damage source scope
